content: demain. nous publions ce qu'on a trouvé. | 1590. Roanoke. 115 disparus. un seul mot gravé dans un arbre. | on a retracé leur chemin.

115 people. one word left behind: CROATOAN. the palisade wasn't burned, it was taken apart -- someone had time. | what's your read? | poll: absorbed into the Croatoan/Hatteras people / moved inland, and the Powhatan found them first / tried the return voyage, lost to the Atlantic / relocated to the Chesapeake -- and erased there instead
no blood. no wreckage. just this. | CROATOAN -- carved clean, at eye height, on the post nearest the gate, no distress marks around it. | the full breakdown is in Tuesday's video.
